events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: form build & bracing, inadequate bracing/kickers for pour pressure, in-progress. ACI 347 reference. Need to fail, high/critical risk.

    "Form bracing/kickers inadequate for anticipated concrete pour pressure",
    "Insufficient lateral support risks form blowout during placement",
    "Work non-compliant with ACI 347 formwork design/bracing requirements"

  "actions": [
    "Stop concrete placement immediately",
    "Shore and brace forms with engineered/adequate kickers, ties, and lateral bracing before any pour",
    "Inspect all form panels, ties, studs, and bearing points for capacity",
    "Verify pour rate and height against formwork pressure rating",
    "Do not resume placement until bracing is corrected and inspected"

  "rationale": "Inadequate bracing/kickers cannot resist concrete pour pressure, creating a high likelihood of form failure/blowout with material and worker-safety consequences. ACI 347 requires formwork and bracing to be designed for anticipated loads and pressures; the observed condition is defective and non-compliant, so the work must fail and placement must halt until corrected.",
  "references": ["ACI 347"]
